title: Expensive gas reduces consumption
description: Analysis showing how rising gas prices led to measurable drops in household and industrial consumption.

title: Football mercato 2022
description: Data-driven breakdown of the 2022 summer transfer market: spending patterns, clubs, and player flows across Europe.

title: Water levels at lowest point in 20 years
description: Visualizing historic low water levels in Belgian rivers and the climate context behind the trend.

title: How affordable is real estate?
description: Multimedia investigation into Belgian housing affordability, combining price data with income and mortgage statistics.

title: Tracking the European gas crisis
description: Live-updated multimedia tracker following European gas storage levels and price volatility throughout the energy crisis.

title: European Championship 2020 analysis
description: Sport data science piece breaking down team and player performance across UEFA Euro 2020.

title: The nitrogen puzzle
description: Scrollytelling explainer on Belgium's nitrogen crisis, walking readers through emission sources, regulations, and political deadlock.

title: Climate change is hardest on the youngest
description: Data-driven visual story showing how younger generations will bear disproportionate consequences of climate change.

title: Forest fires in 2019
description: Global overview of the 2019 wildfire season with geographic and temporal visualizations.

title: What's on Disney+?
description: Exploratory visualization of the Disney+ catalog — genre distribution, release years, and content origin.

title: Trees of Antwerp
description: Open data visualization mapping and analyzing the urban tree inventory of the city of Antwerp.
